label: cheerfulness
pattern: WhenTrue; encounter-conditioned GOOD feeling + negated BAD feeling in observers
gloss: A quality of bright, buoyant good spirits, present in a person or conveyed by a thing or setting, that tends to make people who encounter it feel good and no longer feel bad.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — it renders the tendency to make observers feel good and cease feeling bad, but cannot encode the criterial bright, buoyant, lively quality itself or distinguish gloom from other bad feelings.
